data.title: Critical Metals Corp. reports record TREO results from 33 drill holes at Tanbreez project in Greenland, showing massive upside.
data.description: A recent report has revealed significant geological potential at the Hill Deposit within the Tanbreez Heavy Rare Earth Elements (REE) Project in Greenland. The findings suggest a substantial increase in the geological reserves at the flagship project. This indicates a promising outlook for the project, with the potential for a considerable increase in the identified heavy REE resources. Greenland's Tanbreez project is poised for significant growth and development with this new geological information.

data.title: SpendRule introduces AI system in healthcare to prevent overpayments in $323B market. Gives control over spend categories.
data.description: A recently developed AI system has been introduced for the validation of service invoices prior to payment, providing health systems with oversight over a significant and often overlooked area of expenditure. The system was unveiled by SpendRule in Dallas on February 17, 2026. This new contract intelligence platform aims to aid health systems in managing their finances effectively and efficiently.

data.title: Erath Winery in Oregon achieves B Corporation certification, joining <100 wineries globally with a commitment to social and environmental responsibility.
data.description: A well-known figure in the Oregon wine industry, Erath Winery, based in Dundee, has recently become certified as a B Corporation, joining a global movement aimed at balancing purpose and profit. This distinction sets Erath Winery apart as one of fewer than 100 wineries worldwide with this certification. This move signifies the winery's commitment to meeting rigorous standards of social and environmental performance, accountability, and transparency. The certification was announced on February 17, 2026.

data.title: Nevisense predicts atopic dermatitis in newborns per study at AAAAI conference in Philadelphia. SciBase Holding AB stock symbol STO: SCIB.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, SciBase Holding AB (STO: SCIB), a prominent company specializing in AI-driven diagnostic tools for skin conditions, revealed that findings from a recent research endeavor will be shared via an oral presentation at the upcoming AAAAI conference scheduled in Philadelphia. This announcement indicates the significance of the study's outcomes and emphasizes the company's active involvement in advancing innovative solutions for detecting skin disorders.

data.title: Marketing consultancy GBK Collective appoints Rebecca Szew as Partner and Chief Client Officer in New York.
data.description: In a recent announcement from New York, renowned marketing consultancy GBK Collective has appointed Rebecca Szew as their newest Partner and Chief Client Officer. Renowned for their expertise in marketing strategy, consumer behavior, and analytics, GBK Collective continues to solidify their position in the industry with this key addition to their leadership team.

data.title: Adagene's Chief Strategy Officer will participate in investor meetings at Oppenheimer Conference on Feb 25 and Leerink Conference on Mar 8-11, 2026.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Adagene Inc. (Nasdaq: ADAG) disclosed its participation in upcoming investor events. The company, specializing in novel antibody-based therapies, revealed that Chief Strategy Officer Mickael Chane-Du will partake in one-on-one investor meetings and a fireside chat. These events include the Oppenheimer 36th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference on February 25, 2026, and the Leerink Global Healthcare Conference scheduled for March 8-11, 2026, in Miami, Florida. Adagene aims to showcase its innovative approaches to therapy development and engage with potential investors during these conferences.

data.title: FINTRX expands C-Suite, names CRO & CPO, hires sales director; leading private wealth intelligence platform.
data.description: FINTRX, the top private wealth intelligence platform for asset managers and investment professionals, has appointed a new chief revenue officer and chief product and data officer. The company has also brought on a director of sales to expand its presence in the enterprise market. This announcement was made on Feb. 17, 2026 in Boston.

data.title: Grande Cosmetics appoints Sabeen Mian as Brand President as Founder Alicia Grande becomes Chief Visionary Officer.
data.description: In White Plains, New York, Grande Cosmetics revealed the addition of Sabeen Mian as Brand President. The brand, recognized as the top lash and brow serum brand in the U.S., made this announcement as founder Alicia Grande transitions to the position of Chief Visionary Officer (CVO). Mian, who previously served as President of the Lash Division at Performance Beauty Group, Grande Cosmetics' parent company, boasts a successful two-year tenure in that role. Stepping into her new position, Mian will take the reins at Grande Cosmetics in partnership with the existing team.

data.title: Extraordinary General Meeting of LITGRID AB convened as per Board's Decision on 17 Feb 2026 at Karlo Gustavo Emilio Manerheimo st. 8, Vilnius.
data.description: A notice has been issued by LITGRID AB (company code 302564383), located at Karlo Gustavo Emilio Manerheimo st. 8, LT-05131, Vilnius, announcing the Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting is scheduled as per the Board's Decision of 17 February 2026, with the agenda and decision draft already approved by the Board.

Robots performing kung fu on the stage of the 2026 Spring Festival Gala amazed audiences across the country. Compared with their debut at the 2025 Gala, their movements are obviously smoother, faster, and far more advanced. So, how big is the leap in just one year?

data.title: ManageEngine added new causal intelligence and autonomous AI to Site24x7 platform in Texas, aiming to reduce MTTR and improve SLA compliance for enterprises.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, ManageEngine, a division of Zoho Corporation, has introduced advanced causal intelligence and autonomous AI features to its full-stack observability platform, Site24x7. These updates revolutionize outage management for enterprises, moving from reactive responses to proactive autonomous resilience. With a significant decrease in mean time to recovery (MTTR) and guaranteeing service-level agreement (SLA) adherence, Site24x7 is aiding IT professionals in streamlining operations.

data.title: Sencie partners with The Bower Coronado to enhance luxury guest rooms with WellSense design framework.
data.description: A design studio specializing in restoration has unveiled its WellSense design system, which incorporates immersive sleep practices directly into guest rooms. Based in Irvine, California, Sencie, a company focused on restorative design and sleep wellness, announced the launch on Feb. 17, 2026. This innovative framework aims to enhance the guest experience by incorporating immersive sleep rituals.
Iran foreign minister: Negotiations with IAEA should remain technical

data.title: Netrio expands Belfast office to boost international growth with increased support and delivery scale for mid-market enterprises.
data.description: Netrio has recently increased its reach by expanding its Belfast, Northern Ireland office, further bolstering its 24x7x365 support and delivery services for mid-market enterprises. The move, announced on February 17, 2026, enhances the company's global presence and reinforces its commitment to serving its clients. This expansion signifies a significant stride in Netrio's strategic growth plan, allowing them to reach more businesses efficiently.

data.title: Xerox forms $450M joint venture with TPG to manage, protect, and monetize IP assets, strengthen balance sheet.
data.description: Xerox Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: XRX) has recently revealed the launch and funding of a new collaboration with TPG, a prominent global asset management firm. This joint venture will operate as an entity focused on holding and licensing intellectual property to oversee, safeguard, and capitalize on specific Xerox IP assets. Initiated with an investment of $450 million in total principal amount, the Joint Venture aims to drive strategic IP management and potential monetization opportunities.

data.title: Tyler Technologies has been named to the 2026 GovTech 100 list, recognizing it as a top company in the industry.
data.description: A company based in Plano, Texas, Tyler Technologies, has been acknowledged as a GovTech 100 firm for the year 2026 in the latest business update.

data.title: Q4 earnings season continues with notable companies reporting this week. Palo Alto Networks forecasts 94 cents/share earnings on $2.58 billion revenue.
data.description: The article discusses the upcoming earnings reports for the week in the financial market. On Tuesday, Feb. 17, before market open, companies like Medtronic Plc (NYSE: MDT) and Energy Transfer LP (NYSE: ET) are set to report. After the market closes, Palo Alto Networks is expected to announce earnings of 94 cents per share on revenue of $2.58 billion. Other companies reporting on Tuesday afternoon include Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDNS), Nano Nuclear Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: NNE), Quantum Corp. (NASDAQ: QMCO), and Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN). On Wednesday, Feb. 18, before market open, Moody's Corp. (NYSE: MCO), Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADI), and Garmin Ltd. (NYSE: GRMN) are scheduled to report. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
